summary: GH-97 spec and plan are approved for this minimal Runtime API slice. They cover Viewer refs, control/handoff facts, Core runtime facts readback, and App status fixture while explicitly excluding real viewer transport, full handoff state machine, and cross-repo changes.
reviewed_validation_summary: GH-97 working tree passed `pnpm typecheck`, `pnpm test`, `pnpm smoke:runtime`, `pnpm smoke:runtime:local`, `git diff --check`, JSON readability, `loom verify`, `loom suite validate --item GH-97`, `loom suite carrier validate --item GH-97`, `loom suite evidence validate --item GH-97`, and `loom fact-chain`; `loom build` is blocked by installed CLI path consumption for repo-local `tools/loom.py`, while the required global suite/carrier/evidence surfaces passed separately.
follow_ups: Require a broader suite or new decision if GH-97 expands into real viewer transport, public API/OpenAPI schema, persistent storage, Core/App repository changes, or a full handoff state machine.
Keep PD-0010 and PD-0012 deferred; this PR records minimal facts only and does not decide pause/lock semantics or future viewer transport.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: Spec, plan, implementation contract, task carrier, evidence map, and build evidence agree on the narrow GH-97 scope and consumer boundaries.
